items.title: Burp Suite
items.description: One-liner: HTTP/HTTPS proxy that intercepts, modifies, and replays web requests between your browser and a server.

items.title: Burp Suite — HTTP Interception
items.description: Burp Suite is a man-in-the-middle proxy that intercepts and manipulates HTTP/S traffic between your browser and a server, making it the go-to tool for web application security testing.

items.title: HTTP Toolkit
items.description: One-liner: Intercepts HTTP traffic with a focus on mobile apps — especially Android via ADB.
